body:
📝 Walkthrough ## Walkthrough ワークフロー呼び出しを再利用可能な GitHub Action に置き換え、アクション定義と関連ドキュメントを追加。ingest ロジックの公開 API（`IngestResult` と `main`）を内部化し、`INBOX_BRANCH` を環境変数で制御可能にしました。 ## 変更内容 |Cohort / File(s)|Summary| |---|---| |**ワークフロー呼び出し更新**
`\.github/workflows/review-ingest.yml`|Bun と git 設定ステップを削除し、`uses: ./` による再利用可能アクション呼び出しへ置換。入力（`github-token`、`bot-allowlist`、`inbox-branch`）を追加。| |**再利用可能アクション定義**
`action.yml`|新規追加。inputs 定義と composite 実行シーケンス（Bun セットアップ、依存インストール、git identity、ingest 実行）を含むアクションを追加。| |**README 更新**
`README.md`|「Planned V1」を「Current Status」に置換。採用例（Use In Another Repository）、前提、リポジトリ構成、Next Phase を追記。| |**実装計画更新**
`docs/implementation-plan.md`|V1 完了の現状、Reusable Action トラック、Phase 6（配布・導入）等を追加。/check-inbox スキル参照を文書化。| |**スキル文書追加**
`.claude/commands/check-inbox/SKILL.md`, `docs/skills/check-inbox.md`|/check-inbox オペレーターワークフロー（前提、手順、CLI コマンド、失敗時対応、出力契約）を新規追加。| |**ingest ロジック整理**
`src/actions/ingest.ts`|`IngestResult` を非エクスポート化、`main` を非エクスポート化して内部化、`emptyResult()` 追加。`INBOX_BRANCH` を環境変数で受け取るよう変更。| ## Sequence Diagram(s) ```mermaid sequenceDiagram participant Workflow as "Caller Workflow" participant Action as "Reusable Action" participant Runner as "Action Runner" participant Ingest as "Ingest Script" participant GH as "GitHub API / Repo" Workflow->>Action: 呼び出し (inputs: github-token, bot-allowlist, inbox-branch) Action->>Runner: セットアップ (Bun, install deps, git identity) Runner->>Ingest: 実行: bun run src/actions/ingest.ts (env: INBOX_BRANCH, BOT_ALLOWLIST, GITHUB_TOKEN) Ingest->>GH: GitHub イベント取得 / PR 情報参照 Ingest->>GH: inbox JSONL/MD を `inbox-branch` に書き込み GH-->>Ingest: 書き込み確認 Ingest-->>Runner: 結果レポート (added, unchanged, updated) Runner-->>Action: 実行終了ステータス Action-->>Workflow: 結果返却 ``` ## 推定コードレビュー工数 🎯 3 (Moderate) | ⏱️ ~20 分 ## 詩 > 🐰 小さな足で跳ねてきたよ > アクションの道をつなぐよ > ドキュメントに明かりともして > 内部を整え、外へ手を伸ばす > 一緒に跳べば、次の野原へ
🚥 Pre-merge checks | ✅ 2 | ❌ 1 ### ❌ Failed checks (1 warning) | Check name | Status | Explanation | Resolution | | :----------------: | :--------- | :----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | :--------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Docstring Coverage | ⚠️ Warning | Docstring coverage is 0.00% which is insufficient. The required threshold is 80.00%. | Write docstrings for the functions missing them to satisfy the coverage threshold. |
✅ Passed checks (2 passed) | Check name | Status | Explanation | | :---------------: | :------- | :-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Description Check | ✅ Passed | Check skipped - CodeRabbit’s high-level summary is enabled. | | Title check | ✅ Passed | The pull request title accurately summarizes the main objective: exposing the review-ingest flow as a reusable composite GitHub Action via action.yml and enabling cross-repo adoption. |
✏️ Tip: You can configure your own custom pre-merge checks in the settings.
✨ Finishing Touches
🧪 Generate unit tests (beta) - [ ] Create PR with unit tests - [ ] Post copyable unit tests in a comment - [ ] Commit unit tests in branch `feat/reusable-action-adoption`
📝 Coding Plan - [ ] Generate coding plan for human review comments
--- Comment `@coderabbitai help` to get the list of available commands and usage tips.

🧹 Nitpick comments (1)
.claude/commands/check-inbox/SKILL.md (1)
`22-25`: **文の繰り返しを検討してください。** 3つの連続した文が同じ "Require" で始まっています。可読性を向上させるため、一部の文を言い換えることを検討できます。
♻️ 可読性向上のための提案 ```diff -- Run from the repository root. -- Require `gh` auth, `git`, and `~/.bun/bin/bun`. -- Require an open PR for the current branch, or a user-provided PR number. -- Require Yamabiko-lite source in the repo (`src/cli/main.ts`). +- Run from the repository root. +- Ensure `gh` auth, `git`, and `~/.bun/bin/bun` are available. +- Verify an open PR exists for the current branch, or obtain a user-provided PR number. +- Confirm Yamabiko-lite source is present in the repo (`src/cli/main.ts`). ```
🤖 Prompt for AI Agents ``` Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed. In @.claude/commands/check-inbox/SKILL.md around lines 22 - 25, The three consecutive lines all starting with "Require" in the checklist are repetitive; update the wording to improve readability by either introducing a single heading like "Requirements:" and listing the three items as sub-bullets, or vary the verbs for each item (e.g., "Run from the repository root.", "Ensure gh authentication and that git and ~/.bun/bin/bun are available.", "Have an open PR for the current branch or supply a PR number.", "Include the Yamabiko-lite source (src/cli/main.ts) in the repo"). Keep the same checklist items but change the phrasing so only one line uses "Require" (or none) to avoid repetition. ```
🤖 Prompt for all review comments with AI agents ``` Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed. Nitpick comments: In @.claude/commands/check-inbox/SKILL.md: - Around line 22-25: The three consecutive lines all starting with "Require" in the checklist are repetitive; update the wording to improve readability by either introducing a single heading like "Requirements:" and listing the three items as sub-bullets, or vary the verbs for each item (e.g., "Run from the repository root.", "Ensure gh authentication and that git and ~/.bun/bin/bun are available.", "Have an open PR for the current branch or supply a PR number.", "Include the Yamabiko-lite source (src/cli/main.ts) in the repo"). Keep the same checklist items but change the phrasing so only one line uses "Require" (or none) to avoid repetition. ```
---
ℹ️ Review info
⚙️ Run configuration **Configuration used**: Organization UI **Review profile**: CHILL **Plan**: Pro **Run ID**: `cf7c9c8d-44a2-45f2-821b-21aeb2a3b1d5`
📥 Commits Reviewing files that changed from the base of the PR and between 32621725f26a95457925cc6aa9fb64970a1158de and 54f73fcdb9c0f6fead23a4845d0a84a76d22d53a.
📒 Files selected for processing (4) * `.claude/commands/check-inbox/SKILL.md` * `README.md` * `docs/implementation-plan.md` * `docs/skills/check-inbox.md`
✅ Files skipped from review due to trivial changes (1) * docs/skills/check-inbox.md
🚧 Files skipped from review as they are similar to previous changes (1) * README.md

**Actionable comments posted: 2**

<details>
<summary>🤖 Prompt for all review comments with AI agents</summary>

```
Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed.

Inline comments:
In `@action.yml`:
- Around line 35-43: The git extraheader is being set globally and persists
across steps; change the git config invocation that sets
http.https://github.com/.extraheader to use the --local flag (so it only affects
the current repository) and add a cleanup step that runs in an always()
post-job/finally block to unset that config (remove the
http.https://github.com/.extraheader entry) to ensure the GITHUB_TOKEN_FOR_PUSH
is not left in subsequent steps; target the lines that call git config
http.https://github.com/.extraheader and the surrounding authentication step to
implement the --local change and add the always() teardown that unsets that
config.
- Around line 12-15: The input "inbox-branch" can point at the currently
executing PR branch and be used unguarded as a write target; add a pre-write
guard wherever the inbox-branch input is used (before any push/checkout/write
logic) that checks the resolved branch name against the runtime PR branch (use
github.ref / github.head_ref or equivalent) and aborts with an error if they
match or if the value looks like a PR ref (e.g. refs/pull/* or the head ref),
and enforce a safe policy (reject direct PR branch names or require a dedicated
prefix/whitelist) — apply the same guard to every consumer of the "inbox-branch"
input so the action never mutates PR branches.
```

</details>

---

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment by CodeRabbit for review status -->

_⚠️ Potential issue_ | _🟠 Major_

**`inbox-branch` が実行中ブランチを指せてしまいます。**

Line 12-15 と Line 51-52 では入力値を無条件で書き込み先として使っており、誤設定時に PR ブランチを直接更新するリスクがあります。実行前ガードを追加してください。  
<details>
<summary>修正案（ガード追加）</summary>

```diff
 runs:
   using: composite
   steps:
+    - name: Validate inbox branch target
+      shell: bash
+      env:
+        INBOX_BRANCH: ${{ inputs.inbox-branch }}
+        PR_HEAD_REF: ${{ github.head_ref }}
+        REF_NAME: ${{ github.ref_name }}
+      run: |
+        TARGET_REF="${PR_HEAD_REF:-$REF_NAME}"
+        if [ "$INBOX_BRANCH" = "$TARGET_REF" ]; then
+          echo "inbox-branch must not point to the current branch: $TARGET_REF" >&2
+          exit 1
+        fi
+
     - name: Setup Bun
       uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
```
</details>

   
Based on learnings: "GitHub Actions must stay non-mutating with respect to PR branches."


Also applies to: 51-52

<details>
<summary>🤖 Prompt for AI Agents</summary>

```
Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed.

In `@action.yml` around lines 12 - 15, The input "inbox-branch" can point at the
currently executing PR branch and be used unguarded as a write target; add a
pre-write guard wherever the inbox-branch input is used (before any
push/checkout/write logic) that checks the resolved branch name against the
runtime PR branch (use github.ref / github.head_ref or equivalent) and aborts
with an error if they match or if the value looks like a PR ref (e.g.
refs/pull/* or the head ref), and enforce a safe policy (reject direct PR branch
names or require a dedicated prefix/whitelist) — apply the same guard to every
consumer of the "inbox-branch" input so the action never mutates PR branches.
```

</details>

<!-- fingerprinting:phantom:poseidon:hawk -->

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment by CodeRabbit -->

_⚠️ Potential issue_ | _🟠 Major_

**認証ヘッダーがジョブ内に残留します。**

Line 42 で設定した `http.https://github.com/.extraheader` が後続ステップまで残るため、トークン露出面積が広がります。`--local` の明示と `always()` での解除を追加してください。  
<details>
<summary>修正案（ローカル限定 + 後始末）</summary>

```diff
     - name: Configure git authentication
       shell: bash
       working-directory: ${{ github.workspace }}
       env:
         GITHUB_TOKEN_FOR_PUSH: ${{ inputs.github-token }}
       run: |
         AUTH_HEADER=$(printf "x-access-token:%s" "$GITHUB_TOKEN_FOR_PUSH" | base64 | tr -d '\n')
-        git config http.https://github.com/.extraheader "AUTHORIZATION: basic $AUTH_HEADER"
+        git config --local http.https://github.com/.extraheader "AUTHORIZATION: basic $AUTH_HEADER"

     - name: Run ingestion
       shell: bash
       working-directory: ${{ github.workspace }}
       env:
         ACTION_PATH: ${{ github.action_path }}
         BOT_ALLOWLIST: ${{ inputs.bot-allowlist }}
         GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ inputs.github-token }}
         INBOX_BRANCH: ${{ inputs.inbox-branch }}
       run: bun run "$ACTION_PATH/src/actions/ingest.ts"
+
+    - name: Cleanup git authentication
+      if: ${{ always() }}
+      shell: bash
+      working-directory: ${{ github.workspace }}
+      run: git config --local --unset-all http.https://github.com/.extraheader || true
```
</details>




Also applies to: 44-52

<details>
<summary>🤖 Prompt for AI Agents</summary>

```
Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed.

In `@action.yml` around lines 35 - 43, The git extraheader is being set globally
and persists across steps; change the git config invocation that sets
http.https://github.com/.extraheader to use the --local flag (so it only affects
the current repository) and add a cleanup step that runs in an always()
post-job/finally block to unset that config (remove the
http.https://github.com/.extraheader entry) to ensure the GITHUB_TOKEN_FOR_PUSH
is not left in subsequent steps; target the lines that call git config
http.https://github.com/.extraheader and the surrounding authentication step to
implement the --local change and add the always() teardown that unsets that
config.
```

</details>
